title: Roasted Asparagus German Bowl
description: A hearty German-inspired bowl filled with roasted asparagus and topped with a fried egg. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Toss the asparagus with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 12-15 minutes, or until tender.
In a separate pan, fry the diced chicken breast over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the sliced red onion to the pan and cook until softened.
Stir in the quick German mustard and cook for an additional minute.
To assemble the bowls, place a portion of the roasted asparagus in the bottom of a bowl.
Top with the chicken and onion mixture, followed by a fried egg.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with cubed bread on the side.
